Containers.Name: LSIUtil
Containers.Description: Monitor LSI SAS Host Bus Adapters (9207-8i, SAS2308 and similar) directly from Unraid. Displays real-time HBA temperature with configurable alert threshold and Unraid notification, PCIe link info, per-PHY SAS health counters, attached drive list with SAS addresses and OS device names, HBA firmware event log, and an at-a-glance dashboard tile (Unraid 7.2+). The lsiutil binary is bundled - nothing is downloaded after the initial install. Supported hardware: LSI 9207-8i, 9211-8i, 9205-8i, 9201-16i and other SAS2x08-family cards using the mpt2sas / mpt3sas kernel driver.
